summary: Frontend E2E verification of NEW 'تأكيد وطباعة الإيصال' (confirm-collect-print-btn) button in Delivery Collection dialog. All 7 requested scenarios PASSED with zero JS errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Reports.js still ~4400 lines — recommend splitting tab components into separate files for maintainability (carried over from iteration_182).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Delivery collection dialog footer now has 3 buttons: cancel ('إلغاء'), confirm-collect-btn ('تأكيد التحصيل'), confirm-collect-print-btn ('تأكيد وطباعة الإيصال'). The print button performs the same collection POST then opens a popup window (window.open + window.print) rendering an A4 receipt. The popup is captured as about:blank with rendered HTML content. Login flow: after submit, app redirects to '/' (not '/dashboard') and shows a cashier-shift modal on dashboard — navigate directly to /reports to bypass.

verification_details.success_toast: تم التحصيل وإيداع المبلغ في خزينة المالك بنجاح
